parsed_output.justification: The conversation suggests that Mike is the most suspicious. Chris claims to be the lone werewolf, but his statements about seeing a drunk in the center conflict with Mike’s claim of seeing a werewolf in the center. Mike’s insistence that he was the seer and his knowledge of the center cards, combined with the fact that Chris’s accusations seem self-serving, point to Mike being the werewolf. Eliminating Mike would most likely remove a werewolf from the game.
